name: dobachi-skills
description: Personal skills marketplace for Claude Code

plugins.name: fact-checker
plugins.description: Automated fact-checking for AI-generated documents. Extracts claims, verifies via web search and headless browser (Puppeteer), and generates a Markdown report.

plugins.name: verify-content
plugins.description: Integrated content verification skill. Extracts claims, verifies against external sources, and compiles references in a single workflow.

plugins.name: build
plugins.description: Detects and executes the appropriate build command for your project. Supports Node.js, Rust, Python, Go, Makefile, and other major project types.

plugins.name: checkpoint
plugins.description: Checkpoint management for the AI instruction system. Tracks task start, progress, and completion, and manages instruction usage state.

plugins.name: commit-and-report
plugins.description: Commits changes, pushes to remote, and reports progress to a GitHub Issue in a single workflow.

plugins.name: github-issues
plugins.description: Fetches GitHub Issues, aggregates by label, analyzes priorities, and organizes tasks with actionable suggestions.

plugins.name: reload-instructions
plugins.description: Updates the AI instruction submodule to the latest version and reloads ROOT_INSTRUCTION.

plugins.name: reload-and-reset
plugins.description: Updates the AI instruction system to the latest version and resets AI behavior to align with the instructions.

plugins.name: evidence-check
plugins.description: Verifies references and citations in reports and papers, performing evidence-based fact-checking.

plugins.name: web-api-dev
plugins.description: Expert assistant for designing and implementing production-ready RESTful Web APIs.

plugins.name: cli-tool-dev
plugins.description: CLI development expert that helps design and implement user-friendly command-line tools.

plugins.name: data-analyst
plugins.description: Comprehensive data analysis expert covering statistical insights, visualization, and machine learning.

plugins.name: technical-writer
plugins.description: Expert assistant for creating high-quality technical documents including API docs, user guides, and technical blog posts.

plugins.name: academic-researcher
plugins.description: Comprehensive academic research expert covering paper writing, literature review, citation management, and research methodology.

plugins.name: business-consultant
plugins.description: Comprehensive business consulting using McKinsey/BCG methodologies, from strategy planning to execution support.

plugins.name: project-manager
plugins.description: Project manager skill for comprehensive planning, execution, monitoring, and completion of projects.

plugins.name: startup-advisor
plugins.description: Startup advisor providing practical advice and strategic guidance from launch through growth stages.

plugins.name: python-expert
plugins.description: Python development expert supporting clean code practices, performance optimization, and test-driven development.

plugins.name: code-reviewer
plugins.description: Provides constructive code reviews focusing on quality, security, performance, and maintainability.

plugins.name: marp-slides
plugins.description: Assists in creating effective, professional presentations using the Marp slide framework.

plugins.name: tauri-dev
plugins.description: Development expert for designing and building Tauri v2 desktop and mobile applications.

plugins.name: tauri-research
plugins.description: Research assistant for investigating Tauri-related questions via web search and official documentation.
